description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set within a large, walled rectangular lot. The house features a flat roof, clean lines, and a light-colored facade, with large windows and a central entryway. The front yard is landscaped with several trees, shrubs, and decorative plants, and includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. In the backyard, there is a swimming pool, patio furniture, and additional greenery, creating a comfortable outdoor living space. The property is enclosed by a dark perimeter wall with a prominent front gate. The overall design emphasizes open space, symmetry, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, all enclosed within a walled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped front yard, and the perimeter wall with a central gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's length, backyard pool, patio furniture, and additional trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and side landscaping, with the house's side elevation visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a paved walkway, steps, and a simple overhang, flanked by landscaping and a prominent front gate.
